content.en:
Ye Tian swallowed one after another pieces of Void Bamboo Honey, and began to comprehend the golden text on the other side and the black text on the other side.

During this time, the Lord of Ice and Rain also asked about the situation.

Ye Tian only said that the Xiao family suspended the operation and waited for the notice.

Therefore, the Lord of Ice and Rain did not continue to ask.

The years passed.

One primeval epoch after another passed.

The Xiao family still didn't seem to move, but for the other side level geniuses or Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, even ten thousand primeval era years were just a nap time, not a long time.

They are not in a hurry.

And Ye Tian is even less anxious!

Before you know it, thousands of primeval epochs have passed.

"The Haven on the other side has finally comprehended 109,600 first, and then it's time to attack the Golden Text on the other side!"

Ye Tian began to comprehend the golden text on the other side with all his might.

At this time, his Void Bamboo Honey had all run out, and he had already begun to use Void Golden Bamboo Honey.

If it weren't for the good effect of the Void Golden Bamboo Honey, he wouldn't have been able to comprehend the 109,600 Beyond Dark Texts so quickly!

In the blink of an eye, more than a thousand primeval years have passed.

With the help of the Void Golden Bamboo Honey, Ye Tian finally mastered the 109,600 Golden Texts from the other side.

At this moment, he was finally qualified to create the Supreme Technique of the Other Side.

Of course.

For many Beyond level geniuses, mastering 109,600 Beyond the Golden Script and 109,600 Beyond Haven can be done as long as there is inheritance, time, and treasures.

However, it is still too difficult to create the supreme technique of the other side!

"Like the Lord of Mystery, and other geniuses of the other side, if they want to obtain so many Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore, they all want to use the Origin Bamboo Pulp of the Other Shore to save their lives when creating the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore, so that they can hope to create the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore!"

Ye Tian thought.

But this is only hopeful, and it requires a lot of Origin Bamboo Essence from the other side, the number of which is difficult to calculate.

Ye Tian didn't need the Origin Bamboo Marrow on the other side, he could use the copy body again and again to cultivate, and he was not afraid to sacrifice this copy body.

Therefore, he is the other shore-level genius who has the hope of creating the highest technique on the other side as soon as possible.

In order to create a supreme technique on the other side faster.

Ye Tian not only tried to create with a replica body, but also comprehended some weakened versions of the Other Shore Supreme Techniques or the mutilated Other Shore Supreme Techniques on Wind Tooth Island, using these Other Shore Supreme Techniques as a reference.

In this way, with a reference, he can hopefully create a supreme technique that suits him.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian failed again and again, but he still didn't give up.

And when he failed, he was still improving his other side origin rules.

The Origin Rules of the Other Shore have been improved, and the hope of creating the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore will be greater.

Fail a thousand times!

Fail 10,000 times!

Failed 100,000 times!

If you use the Origin Bamboo Pulp on the other side to save your life, then you need the Origin Bamboo Pulp on the other side to save your life!

It's almost a bottomless pit!

Finally this day.

Ye Tian saw the hope of success.

Rumble!!!!!

When Ye Tian was creating a supreme technique on the other side, with a wave of his hand, his arm was covered by countless golden rays, fused, and then turned into a terrifying arm, and with one blow, it pierced through the depths of endless time and space, penetrating into the Origin Black River.

He was testing his moves in the boundary of territorial waters, which shows how terrifying the power of this blow is.

"The supreme technique on the other side, the initial creation has been successful!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

And this kind of supreme technique on the other side is only a preliminary creation, and there are still some defects, so it will take some time to be completely perfected.

Next.

It would be slightly easier for him to continue to perfect the supreme technique of the other side.

In the end, he named this supreme art on the other side - the Endless Golden Arm!

After creating the Endless Golden Arm, the supreme technique on the other side, Ye Tian's strength had already completed a certain sublimation, and his strength had greatly improved.

"With my current strength, it should be easy to kill that Stone Python!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Xiao family.

Now.

They had already dealt with the affairs with those fallen Shore-level geniuses, and recruited a group of the top Shore-level geniuses, among which there were several Shore-level geniuses whose strength was no less than that of Ye Tian.

These other shore-level geniuses have a complete golden body on the other side, the will of the Origin Realm, and the rules of the Origin of the other side, and their combat power is extremely powerful.

this day.

The Xiao family was ready to enter this treasure land again, and the Lord of Mystery already needed to enter again.

If she didn't go in, no one knew how many good things these other heavens would take away from these treasures and not hand them over to the Xiao family.

In that case, the Xiao family will lose miserably!

"Infinity Lord!"

The Lord of Mystery has come to find Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's replica body never left, so after the Lord of Mystery came, the retreat ended.

"Lord of Mystery, are you going to that treasure land again?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" The Lord of Xuan Miao nodded slightly, "This time, our Xiao family has recruited some other shore-level geniuses through the relationship of the Ancestor, and the strength of three of them may be no less than that of the Endless Lord you." That way, we can keep the exploration going smoothly. "

After the introduction of the Lord of Mysteries.

Ye Tian knew that in addition to recruiting three extremely powerful and demonic-level geniuses, the Xiao family had also recruited dozens of other-level geniuses, all of whom were very top-notch, and they all mastered more than ninety percent of the Golden Body of the Other Shore, the Will of the Origin Realm, and the Origin Rules of the Other Shore.

This time it's obviously bigger than the last one, and there's definitely more to explore.

This time, the Xiao family vowed to bring out all the treasures of this treasure land.

Of course.

The benefits given by the Xiao family are also more, otherwise these other world-level geniuses would not be willing to participate.

......

this day.

Ye Tian, the Lord of Mystery Mystery, and the other Shore-level geniuses set off again and headed for this treasure land.

After entering this treasure land, they directly crossed the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side and went to that mountain range to find the Xuyang Stone.

Before entering that mountain.

The Lord of Mystery reminded: "Everyone, there is a giant python inside that mountain range, its strength is very strong, and it can even petrify ability, even the top Nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses can't stop it. "

"Don't worry, Lord of Mystery, we will definitely keep you safe!"

It was one of the three demon-level geniuses recruited this time - the Lord of the Dragon Lizard!

"Hmm!"

The Lord of Mystery nodded.

She knew that these other shore-level geniuses were used to being arrogant in the outside world, and they were extremely confident in their own strength, so she said that no matter how much she had, it would be useless, and she would only be cautious when these other shore-level geniuses realized the danger here.
